impact: This unblocks the PP&D syntax sentinel repair path before any public source inventory validator behavior is retried.
summary: Restore public source inventory to the syntax-first sentinel only, preserving MODULE_PURPOSE and validator_status import-guard expectations.
target_task: Task checkbox-68: Restore the public source inventory syntax sentinel only: replace `ppd/contracts/public_source_inventory.py` as needed to preserve `MODULE_PURPOSE` and existing import-guard expectations before any validator behavior changes.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
